{{Quote|It was then I was captured. But I am at peace because he is free. Maybe we'll work together again someday. He's a decent guy, after all.|Kav Dryfus on Ryannar N'on Dikasterar|<ref name="The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref>}}
'''Kav Dryfus''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Elom/Legends|Elom]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] who fought against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He originally met [[Ryannar N'on Dikasterar]], an [[Elomin/Legends|Elomin]], during a mining accident, and they were unsteady with each other. Later however, they met again and became friends. Unfortunately, Dryfus was captured, and died in an Imperial prison.

{{Char-stub}}
